mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, tool_id, version, tool_name, tool_type, endpoint_url, input_schema, output_schema, auth_config, require_approval, description, change_reason, created_at FROM t_tool_registry_version WHERE tool_id = #{toolId} AND version = #{version}

SELECT id, tenant_id, tool_id, version, tool_name, tool_type, endpoint_url, input_schema, output_schema, auth_config, require_approval, description, change_reason, created_at FROM t_tool_registry_version WHERE tool_id = #{toolId} ORDER BY version DESC
SELECT MAX(version) FROM t_tool_registry_version WHERE tool_id = #{toolId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_tool_registry_version WHERE tool_id = #{toolId}
